pull-request-footer:
- Merging this PR triggers `build-and-publish.yml` (chained from `release-please.yml`) to build, sign, notarize, upload the macOS DMG and ZIP, and publish the draft release. The git tag is created up front (`force-tag-creation: true`) so release-please has a stable anchor for the next release cycle.
- Do not edit `pubspec.yaml` or `CHANGELOG.md` manually — release-please owns both.
- To skip a release, close this PR; release-please will reopen it on the next merge to main.
